news.headline: Scam gangs snare more than $88bn in Asia‑Pacific, UN says
news.body: A United Nations Office on Drugs and Crime report said scam gangs defrauded Asia‑Pacific residents of at least $88 billion in 2025. The UNODC estimated losses between $88.3 billion and $114.1 billion and warned organised cybercrime is exploiting AI and cross‑border networks.

footerNote: All times converted from official kickoffs
